goal: Split conformance scenario schema and runner internals into focused private modules without changing public API, fixture JSON schema, or behavior, then close the lane with fresh evidence.
checkpoints: after JCSR-020 scenario schema split compiles
stop_conditions: scope expands into new gesture actions or renderer/adapter code
side_effect_policy: Commit only after user confirmation; do not push; do not revert unrelated user changes.
result: Behavior-preserving private scenario/runner module split completed and verified.
